pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and verifier.py which check for the creation of this experiment file.
Verified via setup_task.sh and verifier.py which check for the creation of this conditions CSV file.
Verified in verifier.py which explicitly checks if the generated CSV has at least 12 rows.
Verified in verifier.py which explicitly checks if the generated CSV includes the set sizes 1, 3, and 5.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic condition file and an experiment file. The generated conditions file must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sternberg_conditions.csv, contain at least 12 trials, and include set sizes of 1, 3, and 5. The PsychoPy experiment file must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sternberg_task.psyexp.
